assessment.name: Fintra Analytics Lab
assessment.context: Fintra is one of India's growing e-commerce platforms. Over the past quarter, revenue has declined by 18%, while customer complaints have increased by 12%. You are a Junior Data Analyst working under Priya Sharma (Analytics Lead). Your mission is to discover what's happening before the Executive Board meeting.

missions.title: 🔍 Mission 3: Follow the Clues
missions.context:
You narrowed the issue to conversions. Now identify WHO is experiencing the biggest problem.

Priya remarks:
"Revenue doesn't disappear randomly. Some customer segment is struggling. Find it."

tasks.question: Inspect each customer segment. Choose the one requiring immediate investigation.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Evidence Found:

Mobile App Users
Conversion: 8.5% → 4.7%

You uncovered your first major clue!

+150 XP

Data Literacy +15
Analytical Reasoning +20

tasks.question: Priya asks: "Since resources are tight, rank our next segment investigation paths in order of importance."
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Perfect prioritization!

Analyzing app usability and checkout flows gets us closest to the user's frustration points.

+150 XP

Prioritization +15
Problem Framing +10

tasks.question: Priya asks: "Identify the findings from our segment query that are solid facts, not guesses."
options: Mobile conversion rate decreased from 8.5% to 4.7%
Premium customer conversion remained relatively stable
Revenue decline is concentrated within one customer segment
correctAnswer: Mobile conversion rate decreased from 8.5% to 4.7%
Revenue decline is concentrated within one customer segment
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Great job distinguishing facts!

Basing analysis strictly on proven segment trends prevents bias.

+150 XP

Root Cause Analysis +15
Analytical Reasoning +10

missions.title: 🚚 Mission 4: Investigate Operations
missions.context: You inform Operations. Minutes later, a logistics report arrives. Now determine whether delivery performance explains what happened.
objectives: Connect customer behavior with operational performance.

tasks.question: Highlight the strongest evidence supporting your hypothesis that shipping issues drive cancels.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Excellent analysis!

Operational delays are causing customers to cancel orders. This directly impacts app conversions.

+160 XP

Root Cause Analysis +15
Data Literacy +10

tasks.question: Priya asks: "Which specific delivery statistics verify that delivery quality has plummeted? Select the TWO strongest facts."
options: On-Time Delivery Rate dropped from 94% to 81%
correctAnswer: On-Time Delivery Rate dropped from 94% to 81%
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Robust evidence!

The drop in on-time delivery rate alongside a spike in complaints clearly highlights operational strain.

+160 XP

Root Cause Analysis +20
Analytical Reasoning +10

tasks.question: Based on the delivery data, how confident are you (0–100) that delivery performance issues are a primary driver of the conversion decline?
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Highly confident, and rightly so!

The correlation between late deliveries, app cancellations, and app conversion declines is extremely strong.

+160 XP

Analytical Reasoning +15
Data Literacy +10

missions.title: 💬 Mission 5: Listen to the Customer
missions.context:
Numbers explain WHAT happened. Customers explain WHY it happened.

Read support tickets. Identify recurring themes.
objectives: Read support tickets to uncover operational frictions.

tasks.question: Which themes appear most frequently in the customer support tickets? Pick the TWO recurring issues.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Insight Unlocked!

Customers repeatedly mention Late Delivery and Poor Shipping Updates.

+150 XP

Root Cause Analysis +15
Data Literacy +15

tasks.question: Priya requests: "Rank these candidate mitigation tasks from highest priority to lowest priority based on user feedback."
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Excellent strategy!

Fixing late shipments and status updates satisfies the core customer complaints immediately.

+150 XP

Prioritization +15
Business Thinking +10

missions.title: 🧹 Mission 6: Audit the Evidence
missions.context: Before presenting findings to executives... Verify your data. Even one incorrect record can mislead the entire company.
objectives: Spot bad records and clean the dataset.

tasks.question: Review each order row below. Mark the suspicious entries containing corrupt metrics.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Sharp eyes!

ORD-1002 has 'N/A' days (corrupt string), and ORD-1004 has negative days (-2 days), which is impossible.

+150 XP

Data Quality Awareness +20
Data Literacy +10

tasks.question: Before presenting findings to leadership, what should the Analytics Team do to fix these records?
options: Validate and clean questionable records before finalizing conclusions.
tasks.correctAnswer: Validate and clean questionable records before finalizing conclusions.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Correct standard protocol!

Cleaning and validating the dataset ensures stakeholders trust the insights and reports.

+150 XP

Data Quality Awareness +15
Business Thinking +10

missions.title: 🤝 Mission 7: Boardroom Debate
missions.context:
Each department believes they're right:
• Operations: "We need logistics."
• Marketing: "We need more customers."
• Finance: "We need cost reduction."
• Product: "We need redesign."

Recommend where the company should invest first.
objectives: Recommend where the company should invest first.

tasks.question: Rank the following initiatives from highest priority to lowest priority based on the investigation findings.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Board Decision:

Your recommendation matches the Operations team's findings.

Leadership Confidence: 92%!

+180 XP

Prioritization +20
Business Thinking +15

tasks.question: Which stakeholder recommendation is most strongly supported by the investigation?
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Spot on!

Fixing shipping bottlenecks directly addresses the root causes of app cancellation spikes and revenue drops.

+180 XP

Business Thinking +15
Analytical Reasoning +15

tasks.question: You have 100 project points available. How many points would you allocate to Improve Delivery Performance (0–100)?
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Balanced score!

Allocating ~40% to logistics resolves the core bottleneck while keeping budget open for app enhancements.

+180 XP

Prioritization +15
Business Thinking +15

missions.title: 👑 Final Mission: Present to the CEO
missions.context: The board is waiting. Summarize everything you've learned. Recommend the next steps.

tasks.question: Executive Summary: Complete the investigation. Select the conclusion best supported by evidence.
options: Revenue declined primarily because website traffic decreased significantly.
The investigation indicates that delivery performance issues are contributing to lower conversion rates among Mobile App Users.
The investigation indicates that product quality concerns are driving customer dissatisfaction.
The investigation was unable to identify a likely cause.
tasks.correctAnswer: The investigation indicates that delivery performance issues are contributing to lower conversion rates among Mobile App Users.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Excellent conclusion!

This captures the complete logic flow of the problem from app users to cancellation rates to shipping bottlenecks.

+200 XP

Communication +15
Business Thinking +15

tasks.question: Arrange the following actions in the order they should be implemented.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Flawless roadmap!

First fix the engine (deliveries), then instrument dashboards (comms), polish app UI, and finally market to new users.

+200 XP

Prioritization +20
Business Thinking +15

tasks.question: Which recommendation should be presented to the CEO?
options: Reduce logistics investment to lower costs.
Prioritize resolving delivery performance issues before investing in growth initiatives.
Delay all business actions until additional data becomes available.
tasks.correctAnswer: Prioritize resolving delivery performance issues before investing in growth initiatives.
tasks.coachingFeedback:
Congratulations!

You successfully delivered the Executive Recommendation to the CEO before the board meeting!

The board has approved the budget for logistics refinement.

+200 XP

Business Thinking +20
Communication +15
